message:
fix(tests): resolve 4 failing lib tests

- rpc retry tests: use retryable error message "server error" instead
  of non-retryable "boom" so is_retryable_error() matches correctly
- conformance proptest: dedup generated registration lists by key field
  to prevent false reflexivity failures from duplicate IDs
- extensions_js crypto: add __pi_crypto_bytes_to_array helper to handle
  rquickjs Vec<u8>→hex-string coercion, fixing randomBytes/getRandomValues/randomUUID

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
